data.title: DDoS Mitigation
data.description: Systems to protect against distributed denial of service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Automatic detection and rerouting of malicious traffic.

data.title: Video Content Encryption
data.description: Encrypted streaming to prevent unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes TLS and DASH for secure content delivery.

data.title: Two-Factor Authentication
data.technical_spec: Google Authenticator or SMS for secondary verification.

data.title: Automated Threat Detection
data.description: Proactively detecting suspicious activities on the platform.
data.technical_spec: Uses Google's AI to monitor and flag potential threats.

data.title: Secure API Deployment
data.description: APIs are securely managed to prevent data leaks.
data.technical_spec: OAuth 2.0 and API gateways for secure calls.
